title: hymenophyllum macrosorum
intro: Hymenophyllum macrosorum, also known as the giant hair fern or large-fruited scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum macrosorum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
